summary: Iteration 19 - Branch Orders with Recipe System and Auto Raw Material Deduction Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for Branch Orders page including new order dialog with recipe status display, order details with raw materials deducted section, tabs, and filters.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful (401 without auth)
GET /api/finished-products - Returns finished products with recipe status
POST /api/finished-products - Create finished product with recipe
POST /api/branch-orders - Create order with auto raw material deduction
POST /api/branch-orders - Verify correct quantities deducted from raw materials

branch_orders_api.notes: POST /api/branch-orders creates orders and automatically deducts raw materials from main warehouse based on product recipes

recipe_validation.notes: API correctly rejects orders for products without recipes

raw_material_availability_check.notes: API correctly rejects orders when raw materials are insufficient

raw_material_deduction.notes: Correct quantities are deducted from raw materials after order creation

recipe_status_display.notes: Product dropdown shows recipe status: green 'وصفة X مكونات' for products with recipe, red 'بدون وصفة' for products without

order_details_deducted_materials.notes: Order details dialog shows 'المواد الخام المخصومة' section in blue with material name, quantity, and unit

branch_orders_page.notes: Page displays orders with tabs (outgoing/incoming), status filter, new order button, and order cards

new_order_dialog.notes: Dialog shows branch selector, priority selector, product selector with recipe status, quantity input, and submit button

critical_code_review_comments: Branch orders API correctly implements recipe-based raw material deduction
Finished products created via /api/finished-products endpoint include recipe with calculated cost
Order response includes raw_materials_deducted array with material details
Frontend correctly displays recipe status in product dropdown (green for with recipe, red for without)
Order details dialog shows deducted raw materials in highlighted blue section
API properly validates: product has recipe, raw materials are sufficient, items are not empty
seed_data_creation: Created test raw materials and finished products with TEST_ prefix during testing. Cleanup performed at end of tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 completed. Branch Orders with Recipe System features all working: 1) POST /api/branch-orders - creates orders from finished products and automatically deducts raw materials from main warehouse based on recipes, 2) API validates: product must have recipe, raw materials must be sufficient, 3) GET /api/finished-products - returns products with recipe array showing ingredients, 4) Branch Orders page (/branch-orders) - displays orders with tabs (outgoing/incoming), filters, new order dialog with product selection showing recipe status (green for with recipe, red for without), 5) Order details show 'المواد الخام المخصومة' (Raw Materials Deducted) section in blue. The system correctly tracks: finished products -> recipes -> raw materials -> automatic deduction on order creation.
